owner_corrected_definition: Forex 110 means true Forex completion toward profitable supervised/autonomous operation, not repo-safe completion or dashboard polish.
forex_110_definition: Forex 110 is reached only when profit proof, 22H/day 6D/week readiness, broker/demo/live gate evidence, safety controls, dashboard truth, and one-man operator control are either proven by repository evidence or locked with exact blockers.
current_truth_summary: Prior Forex 110 artifacts prove a repo-safe and dashboard-UX gate only. Current repo evidence does not prove profitable supervised/autonomous operation, 100% to 120% return expectancy, completed 22H/6D observation, demo execution readiness, live readiness, complete sanitized broker-read-only evidence, persistent profitability, or final safety-control closure.

blockers: persistent profitability is below proof threshold
100% to 120% return expectancy is not proven by current repository evidence
walk-forward/OOS segment total and pass counts are missing or incomplete
sanitized broker-read-only evidence is partial or fixture-bound
broker account reachability, open positions reconciliation, daily P/L, realized P/L, unrealized P/L, margin risk, and trading-history writeback are not complete
broker contact, credentials, environment reads, account inspection, and orders remain blocked
interruption, manual override, and evidence freshness fields are missing
planning doctrine exists but completed repository-backed observation proof does not
RISK_POLICY.md live exception is not active
prior dashboard 110 framing can imply completion optimism
dashboard must show real readiness blockers by default
dashboard remains display-only and must not expose execution controls

required_evidence: current walk-forward/OOS segment total and passed counts
after-cost, drawdown-aware persistent profitability proof meeting the threshold
100% to 120% return expectancy proof or explicit failure analysis
22H/6D observed hours, sessions, days, interruption counts, manual override counts, freshness, and sanitized source labels
sanitized broker-read-only account reachability, positions, daily P/L, realized P/L, unrealized P/L, margin risk, and trading-history writeback proof
kill switch, daily stop, max loss, monitoring, one-order-only, stop loss, and take profit final-gate proof
dashboard state that shows blocked/partial/proven truth without execution controls

next_packet_chain.goal: Collect and validate walk-forward/OOS counts, persistent profitability, and 100% to 120% expectancy proof or exact failure blockers.
Create sanitized broker-read-only evidence without credentials, account identifiers, account inspection beyond approval, orders, demo start, or live start.
Collect completed 22H/6D observation metrics and freshness proof.
Prove kill switch, max loss, daily stop, one-order-only, SLTP, and monitoring controls remain fail-closed.
Make dashboard truth reflect proven/partial/blocked readiness without corporate sprawl or execution controls.

safe_next_action: Run PKT-FOREX-110-PROFIT-PROOF-REAL-EVIDENCE-CLOSURE-V1 next; do not trade, do not start demo/live execution, and do not contact broker APIs.
